title: Lab autostart: watcher + startup orientation on lab open
description: Operator #15779: everything should launch when the AI Command Center Lab opens, and agents should ask on their own from the get go. Wire start-limit-watcher.sh (idempotent) into the ai-command-center-lab launcher, and extend both lab agent startup prompts with a boot-orientation routine: undeclare standby, read latest handoff/snapshot + status, check runner route, then send bigboss one message -- a resume plan if in-flight work exists, or a priorities request if the queue is empty.
acceptance_criteria: Watcher starts idempotently on lab open and its failure cannot block the lab from opening
Both lab agents get a startup-orientation instruction ending in exactly one proactive hcom message to bigboss
bash -n passes on all edited scripts; existing behavior (tabs, tags, visibility rules) unchanged
objective: One action (open the lab) brings up the whole system: monitor, both agents with proactive startup orientation, and the RnS watcher -- nothing needs manual restarting after a reboot.
forbidden_changes: No changes to tab structure, hcom tags, or visibility rules
Watcher start must not be able to abort lab launch (set -eu guard)
expected_artifacts: launcher starts watcher idempotently before wezterm exec
both agent prompts gain the boot-orientation paragraph
bash -n clean on all three scripts
risk: Low: additive lines to launch scripts; watcher start guarded non-fatal; prompts are text-only changes.
